fields.name: Wireless Headphones
fields.description: Premium over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation and 30-hour battery life for an immersive listening experience.

fields.name: Yoga Mat
fields.description: Non-slip, eco-friendly yoga mat made from natural rubber, providing superior grip and cushioning for all yoga styles.

fields.name: Reusable Water Bottle
fields.description: Double-walled stainless steel water bottle that keeps drinks cold for 24 hours and hot for 12 hours.

fields.name: Running Shoes
fields.description: Lightweight and breathable running shoes with responsive cushioning and a waterproof upper for all-weather performance.

fields.name: Laptop Stand
fields.description: Adjustable aluminum laptop stand with ergonomic design to improve posture and reduce neck strain during long work sessions.

fields.name: Cast Iron Skillet
fields.description: Pre-seasoned cast iron skillet that delivers even heat distribution for perfect searing, baking, and frying.

fields.name: Graphic Tee
fields.description: Soft cotton graphic tee featuring bold artistic prints, perfect for casual everyday wear.

fields.name: Bluetooth Speaker
fields.description: Compact waterproof Bluetooth speaker with 360-degree sound and 12-hour battery life, perfect for outdoor adventures.

fields.name: Journal
fields.description: Beautifully crafted hardcover journal with thick, acid-free pages ideal for writing, sketching, and daily reflection.

fields.name: Hiking Backpack
fields.description: Durable 40L hiking backpack with waterproof coating, multiple compartments, and ergonomic shoulder straps for long trails.

fields.name: Smart Watch
fields.description: Feature-rich smartwatch with health tracking, GPS, and customizable watch faces to keep you connected on the go.

fields.name: Denim Jacket
fields.description: Classic slim-fit denim jacket with a timeless design that pairs effortlessly with any outfit.

fields.name: French Press
fields.description: Elegant stainless steel French press that brews rich, full-bodied coffee using sustainably sourced, organic-friendly materials.

fields.name: Resistance Bands
fields.description: Set of five resistance bands in varying tension levels, perfect for strength training and rehabilitation exercises anywhere.

fields.name: Mechanical Keyboard
fields.description: Tactile mechanical keyboard with customizable RGB backlighting and durable switches rated for 50 million keystrokes.

fields.name: Linen Pants
fields.description: Breathable and lightweight linen pants made from sustainably sourced fabric, perfect for warm weather and casual occasions.

fields.name: Cookbook
fields.description: A beautifully illustrated cookbook featuring 150 wholesome recipes using organic, seasonal ingredients from around the world.

fields.name: Desk Lamp
fields.description: Sleek LED desk lamp with adjustable brightness levels and a flexible neck for focused task lighting anywhere.

fields.name: Protein Powder
fields.description: High-quality whey protein powder made from organic, grass-fed sources with no artificial flavors or sweeteners.

fields.name: Wireless Charger
fields.description: Fast wireless charger compatible with all Qi-enabled devices, featuring a slim design and smart charging technology.
